calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Edward Puttre appearing for the estate. He has filed a declaration as requested by the Court. He has received no examiner's notes. Court stated there are defects not corrected. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Continued To Aug-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: EDWARD A. PUTTRE, APPEARING FOR PETITIONER
COUNSEL IS ATTEMPTING TO COMPLETE THE COURT EXAMINERS REQUEST. THE ACCOUNT VERIFICATION FOR WELLS FARGO BANK HAS NOW BEEN SIGNED IN BLUE INK BUT THE BANK WILL NOT BACK DATE. THE COURT EXAMINER STILL WILL NOT ACCEPT THEM. THE "SBC" PAYMENT HAS BEEN MADE. THE COURT ASK THE COUNSEL SUBMIT A DECLARATION ADDRESSING ALL OF THE EXAMINER NOTES AND TO SUBMIT IT. THE COURT WILL HOLD ORDER UNTIL THE DECLARATION IS RECIEVED. MATTER CONTINUED TO 8/28/07.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF: M. LOOS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Continued To Aug-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward Puttre and Steve Robinson appearing as co-executors. Mr. Puttre has filed the amended account to comply with the probate examiner's concerns. He will need to re-notice the amended account. Court noted the procedural problems have not been corrected and strongly suggested the executors to use a probate paralegal to help them with the accounting. A list of probate paralegals was given to Mr. Puttre. Matter is continued to 8/7. OSC is discharged.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Jul-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Edward Puttre has left a voicemail message stating he is not coming to court today. Court will issue an OSC to Edward Puttre to show cause why he should not be punished for contempt. Return date is 7/3.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Continued To May-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward Puttre appearing in pro per. He is still waiting for the fiduciary return. Court questioned why it is taking so long. Matter is continued to 5/22.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

MINI MINUTES: Edward Puttre appearing as executor. Mr. Puttre wants to file a new petition for final distibution and revised final account. He has not responded to the examiner's notes from last October. Matter is continued to 4/17 for the executor to respond to the examiner's notes.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
